requirements.task_name: Register a 7-year-old for the earliest beginner swim class after 4 PM under $120
requirements.task_description: Find kids’ swim lessons, filter for ages 6–8 at Beginner 1 level starting at or after 4:00 PM and costing no more than $120, then register the child for the class with the soonest start date.

requirements.task_name: Reserve the cheapest indoor lap lane tomorrow between 6:00–7:00 AM under $15
requirements.task_description: Use the lap lane reservation system to find indoor lanes available tomorrow between 6:00–7:00 AM, filter to options that cost no more than $15, sort by price, and reserve the cheapest available lane.

requirements.task_name: Purchase a 1-month family membership with pool and fitness access under $120 that has the latest closing time
requirements.task_description: Find family memberships for 1 month, filter for plans that include both pool and fitness center access costing no more than $120, compare the listed weekday closing times for at least two plans, and purchase the plan with the latest weekday closing time at or after 10:00 PM (choosing the cheapest if there is a tie).

required_variables.set_condition: Whenever getMembershipPlanDetail(membershipPlanId) is called for a plan that meets the Task 3 filter criteria: status === 'active', membership_type === 'family', duration === 'one_month', pool_access_included === true, fitness_center_included === true, and price <= 120.
required_variables.value_to_set: Read current array from localStorage (or [] if missing), append membershipPlanId if not already present, then save back, e.g. ['plan_123','plan_456'].
required_variables.reason: Tracks which qualifying membership plans the user actually viewed in detail, allowing the evaluator to verify that the user compared at least two under-$120 family 1‑month plans with both pool and fitness access before purchasing the one with the latest (>= 10:00 PM) weekday closing time.

requirements.task_name: Reserve a Saturday birthday party for 15 kids with a private room and pizza under $350
requirements.task_description: Navigate to party rentals, select a specific Saturday date, specify a group size of 15 kids, filter for birthday packages that include a private party room and pizza, sort by price, and reserve the cheapest option costing less than $350.

requirements.task_name: Add three evening open swim sessions next week (indoor and outdoor) to My Schedule
requirements.task_description: Use the pool schedule to find open swim sessions in the next calendar week starting at or after 5:00 PM, choose at least one indoor and one outdoor session on different weekdays, and add a total of three sessions to the user’s My Schedule list.

requirements.task_name: Buy 5 digital guest passes with the lowest total price under $60
requirements.task_description: Go to the passes section, filter for digital guest passes, identify an option that provides exactly 5 visits for less than $60 (either as a 5-visit pass or a quantity of single-visit passes), choose the cheapest qualifying option, and complete the purchase.

requirements.task_name: Enroll in a weekend lifeguard certification course under $300 that ends before June 30 and includes CPR
requirements.task_description: Find lifeguard certification courses held on weekends only, filter to those that cost less than $300, end before June 30, and include CPR/First Aid, sort by shortest total duration, and enroll in the shortest qualifying course.

requirements.task_name: Register for two different evening aqua fitness classes on different days under $20 each with no time overlap
requirements.task_description: Find aqua fitness classes in the evening (6–8 PM) that cost less than $20 per session, choose one class on Monday or Tuesday and a different class type on Wednesday, Thursday, or Friday with non-overlapping times, add both to the cart, and proceed to checkout.
